programme.title: Bastarden
programme.desc: Year 1755, Denmark.The impoverished Captain Ludvig (Mads Mikkelsen) asks the king for permission to establish a colony on his behalf on the barren moors famous for their infertility.If successful, he expects to be awarded a knighthood and property.The aristocrats are outraged by his arrogance and assume defeat, but he receives consent.From then on, every day for Ludvig and his relatives is spent on hard, physical work beyond their strength, which will allow them to prepare the land for cultivation.They also hire people to help them - two runaway servants: Ann Barbara (Amanda Collin) and her husband.Months pass and the first buildings are built when the ruthless Frederik de Schinkel (Simon Bennebjerg), the land lord, tries to take over the moors.When Ludvig rejects his offer, he decides to destroy it.

programme.title: Man on Fire
programme.desc: American John Creasy (Denzel Washington) is a man haunted by nightmares from his past.He is a former assassin who worked for the CIA for many years.Frustrated, he avoids people and seeks solace in alcohol.Creasy comes to Mexico to visit his old friend and colleague, Rayburn (Christopher Walken).The city is currently gripped by a wave of kidnappings for ransom.Rich residents panic and many of them hire security guards to ensure the safety of their children.A friend finds John a job as a bodyguard for ten-year-old Pita Ramos (Dakota Fanning), the daughter of Mexican industrialist Samuel Ramos (Marc Anthony) and his American wife Lisa (Radha Mitchell).At first, Creasy has a hard time coping with the girl's presence.Over time, however, he becomes friends with her.Under its influence, he changes his attitude to life and gives up alcohol.Soon, however, little Pita is kidnapped.The desperate man does everything to save her.

programme.title: The Martian
programme.desc: A mission to the Red Planet is interrupted by a sandstorm.A team of astronauts evacuates to Earth, leaving one of the expedition members, Mark Watney (Matt Damon), on the surface of Mars, believing he is dead.After some time, the seriously injured astronaut regains consciousness.He realizes that his air and food supplies will soon be exhausted.He also cannot count on a rescue mission because he was presumed dead.Despite this, he tries to survive in difficult conditions and notify the inhabitants of Earth that he is alive and waiting for help.Ridley Scott's film is nominated for an Oscar in seven categories, including:as the best film and for the leading role of Matt Damon.Director Ridley Scott, the creator of such cult sci-fi films as "Blade Runner" and the Alien series, was a candidate for the Academy Award four times.

programme.title: A Royal Christmas Ballet
programme.desc: Former ballet dancer Carrie (Brittany Underwood) is to prepare a performance of "The Nutcracker" on the occasion of a visit from a foreign delegation.While working on the play, she becomes involved in an affair.

programme.title: Broke
programme.desc: Former rodeo champion True cannot accept the end of his career.He is surprised by a violent blizzard.He fights for survival.

programme.title: Silver Star
programme.desc: African American Billie (Troy Leigh-Anne Johnson) is twenty years old and a tomboy.He comes from a military family and is missing one eye.After serving her prison sentence, she discovers that her separated parents are facing eviction.He decides to prevent this at all costs.The woman decides to rob a bank, but the action ends in failure.As a result, the young criminal takes her client hostage.Pregnant Franny (Grace Van Dien) is eighteen years old and has a head open to crazy ideas.Together they escape and set off on an adventurous journey.At one point, Franny offers Billie an unexpected deal.

programme.title: Vinci 2
programme.desc: Cuma receives an offer to participate in a new heist.At first he refuses, but changes his mind when he learns that his old rival, Chudy, is planning a spectacular robbery in Krakow without his participation.

programme.title: In short
programme.desc: The year 2019, on the threshold of the pandemic.Single woman Ellen (Laura Tonke) spends New Year's Eve with her friends.No one knows that she is having an affair with Sebastian (Ronald Zehrfeld), Eva's (Antje Traue) husband.Rolf (Nicholas Ofczarek) and Dina (Pegah Ferydoni) make a perfect couple, unlike Mareike (Annette Frier) and Adam (Trystan Pütter).Maya (Katia Fellin) wants children, Natalie (Jasmin Shakeri) cannot decide.Max (Henning Flüsloh) comes into Ellen's life and he would love her if she let him.Years pass.The woman attends various types of celebrations, birthday parties and casual social gatherings.He learns about events in his friends' lives.The sense of community unites and allows everyone to return to everyday life with positive energy.Remake of the Danish film "A Long Story Briefly".

programme.title: Karate Kid: Legends
programme.desc: Li Fong's friend needs help.He decided to take part in a karate tournament, but his skills are insufficient.Teacher Han turns to the legendary Daniel LaRusso for help.

programme.title: Kingdom of Heaven
programme.desc: 12th century.The young blacksmith Balian (Orlando Bloom) loses his entire family in tragic circumstances.He begins to doubt the existence of God.Then he is visited by the crusader Godfrey of Ibelin (Liam Neeson), who turns out to be his father.He suggests his son learn knightly crafts.One day, Balian kills a priest in a fight.He must escape.Together with Godfrey, he sets off for Jerusalem.On the way, his father is killed by the bishop's men.Prudent King Baldwin IV (Edward Norton) and his advisor Tiberias (Jeremy Irons) strive for peaceful solutions.Thanks to them, there are no hostilities in Jerusalem.They even manage to reach a truce with the leader of the Muslims, Saladin (Ghassan Massoud).However, the ruler's conciliatory policy does not please some greedy and fanatical crusaders.Meanwhile, Balian falls in love with the king's sister, the already married princess Sibyl (Eva Green).The girl does not love her husband, Baron Guy de Lusignan (Marton Csokas).Soon the Crusaders start a war with the Muslims.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: Doug (Jack Black) and Griff (Paul Rudd) have been friends since childhood.They have always dreamed of making a remake of their favorite film, the horror film "Anaconda".When both buddies experience a midlife crisis, they decide not to wait any longer and set off together deep into the Amazon to start filming.The situation becomes more complicated when... a real giant anaconda appears on the film set, spreading chaos and destruction around.Despite the deadly threat, the friends decide to take advantage of the predator's presence.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 4
programme.desc: Brave Po opens a new chapter in his life - he is to become the spiritual leader of the Valley of Peace.He's trying to get used to his new role.In addition, the voracious bear must find a daredevil who will replace him as the Dragon Warrior.Not everything goes according to plan.This time, China's security is threatened by Chameleon, who wields black magic and can take on any form and take over the abilities of old masters.With the help of a smart vixen and former thief, Zhen, the panda bear must face her.But they need allies to defeat the shape-shifting witch and the sinister army behind her.The time of a merciless fight is inevitably approaching... The voices of the characters include, among others:Marcin Hycnar, Jan Peszek, Wiktor Zborowski and Julia Chatys.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: The further fate of a group of friends who left school behind and entered adulthood.The action moves forward several years.Rue (Zendaya Coleman) is no longer a lost teenager, but a person involved in the criminal world.He goes to interrogation in connection with smuggling drugs from Mexico.Cassie (Sydney Sweeney) and Maddy's (Alexa Demie) relationship has improved, but old wounds haven't healed at all.The first woman's relationship with Nate (Jacob Elordi) develops, but not towards a happy ending.The remaining characters confront their own choices, addiction and violence.They are looking for redemption and answers to the question about their place in the world.

programme.title: Peacemaker 2
programme.desc: Two years have passed since the last events.Chris Smith (John Cena) considers himself a real hero.However, he must earn the recognition of other heroes.

programme.title: G20
programme.desc: During the G20 summit, the leaders of the world's influential countries become the targets of terrorists.US President Danielle Sutton (Viola Davis) miraculously manages to escape the attackers.She must face the enemy alone.

credits.actor: Prime Minister Oliver Everett - Douglas Hodge
Treasury Secretary Joanna Worth - Elizabeth Marvel

programme.title: Laws of Man
programme.desc: A suspenseful story set in the paranoid climate of the Cold War era.The year is 1963. Two federal marshals are investigating a case in rural Nevada.They are on the trail of a sinister conspiracy.

programme.title: Blue Valentine
programme.desc: Dean grew up in a broken home.He never planned to build a lasting relationship until he met Cindy, with whom he fell in love at first sight.When, after a few weeks of dating, it turns out that the girl is expecting another man's child, she makes the difficult decision to get married.The couple tries to create a happy family, but over time they begin to face a serious crisis.The infatuation disappears, and everyday problems make it difficult for them to find understanding.Dean abuses alcohol and does simple physical work, unable to guarantee his wife real stability and support.The couple falls into conflicts more and more often.However, he still tries to rebuild his relationships for the sake of little Frankie.This perfectly portrayed study of the breakdown of a relationship was nominated for the Grand Jury Prize at the Sundance Film Festival.The role of Michelle Williams was nominated for an Oscar and a Golden Globe.

programme.title: It's a Wonderful Knife
programme.desc: A year ago, teenage Winnie Carruthers (Jane Widdop) had to face a psychopathic murderer, Henry Waters (Justin Long), on Christmas Eve, whose victim was also her best friend.Now it's Christmas again in the town of Angel Falls.Winnie still remembers the tragic events, although her father David (Joel McHale) and other loved ones advise her to leave the difficult past behind.A misunderstood girl on a bridge on Christmas night makes a wish - she would prefer to have never been born.He then finds himself in a nightmarish parallel universe.He discovers that without her, everything could have turned out much worse.No one recognizes her here, she is a stranger even to her family and friends.And what's worse, Henry is still alive and the mayor of Angel Falls.The teenager must regain her former life and face a bloodthirsty murderer.A bloody variation on the famous Christmas classic - "It's a Wonderful Life" by Frank Capra.

programme.title: Little Emma
programme.desc: A little girl named Emma was raised by animals.Her life is full of warmth and joy, until one of her friends discovers the unpleasant truth that she was actually adopted and is not part of their family.Devastated, Emma sets out on a journey to find her loved ones.Along the way, he gathers an extraordinary team, including the clumsy inventor Żółwik Bystrzak, the ambitious scientist Edward Wilk and the brave Weasel Sancho.Together they are looking for a mysterious island which, according to legend, is inhabited by tiny people.

programme.title: Book of Dragons
programme.desc: Hiccup, Astrid, Fishlegs and Gobber learn the secrets of the dragons contained in the book.Gobber tells the others the story of Borek the Unlucky, who was the first to describe these unusual creatures.

programme.title: E Poi Si Vede
programme.desc: Three friends compete for an attractive job at the city hall.Federico relies on his father's connections, Fabrizio feels that he is born for this job, and Luca is always lucky.

programme.title: P.S. I Love You
programme.desc: After the death of her husband Gerry (Gerard Butler), Holly (Hilary Swank) falls into a deep depression.On her 30th birthday, a woman receives a mysterious parcel.The cake comes with a tape with a recorded message from... Gerry.He encourages his beloved to go out and have fun with friends.After this event, new letters regularly arrived to the young widow, each ending with a declaration of love.Gerry knew how much his wife would suffer from losing him.In letters written before her death, he encourages her to take on various challenges.Thanks to her extraordinary sense of connection with the deceased, a woman in despair undergoes specific therapy and tries to start her life anew.

programme.title: Big Fish
programme.desc: Edward Bloom (Albert Finney), a brilliant storyteller and favorite of the neighborhood, is dying.His son Will (Billy Crudup) left home long ago, not wanting to live forever in the shadow of his father's fantastic stories.Now she returns to accompany him in his last moments.Listening to Edward's stories again, Will tries to put them together to make sense.The picture that emerges is surprisingly coherent and shows the father's life in a new light.The son realizes who his father really was.Tim Burton, one of the most eccentric creators of American cinema, created a film that captivates with its warmth, fairy-tale atmosphere and surreal poetics.The script is based on the novel "Big Fish: A Story of Mythic Proportions" by Daniel Wallace.We will see Ewan McGregor as young Edward.The atmospheric music received an Oscar nomination.

programme.title: Detective Monk: One last thing
programme.desc: Brilliant detective Adrian Monk (Tony Shalhoub) is going through difficult times.The contract to publish his autobiography was canceled, and the coronavirus pandemic intensified his fears and phobias.All this makes the master of deduction start thinking about ending his life and joining his beloved Truda.He is jolted out of his torpor by the tragedy that befalls his stepdaughter Molly (Caitlin McGee).The girl is getting ready to marry journalist Griffin Briggs (Austin Scott).However, her fiancé dies while bungee jumping.Molly is convinced that it was not an accident, but a carefully planned murder.The trail leads to the influential billionaire Rick Eden (James Purefoy).Retired Captain Stottlemeyer (Ted Levine) now works for the rich man as his security chief.Monk is assisted in the investigation by former assistant and now real estate agent Natalie Teeger (Traylor Howard) and Randy Disher (Jason Gray-Stanford), now the New Jersey police commissioner.Continuation of the cult series.

programme.title: In-laws 3
programme.desc: In a recreation center that has already passed its glory days, Wanda (Izabela Kuna) and Tadeusz (Adam Woronowicz) organize their grandson's baptism.At the family celebration, to which they invite Małgorzata (Maja Ostaszewska) and her friend, psychotherapist Grażyna (Magdalena Popławska), the former husband of the first woman, Andrzej (Marcin Dorociński), who comes from Australia with... his son Stanley (Noah Lucewicz), also appears.The atmosphere of the meeting quickly gets out of control, and old conflicts and new romances lead to surprising consequences.The local police must intervene.The third part of the comedy, with a pinch of salt, showing the class struggle.

programme.title: One of Them Days
programme.desc: Dreux (Keke Palmer) and Alyssa (SZA) are like lovebirds, they have been friends for years and share an apartment.Their everyday lives suddenly turn upside down when they discover that Alyssa's boyfriend has squandered all their savings - money that was supposed to be used to pay the rent.The girls face a real challenge: in an atmosphere full of funny adventures, they must quickly find a way to get the missing amount and avoid eviction.It quickly turns out that they will be forced to take truly unusual actions to not only save their home, but also put their friendship to the test.

programme.title: Another Simple Favor
programme.desc: Emily Nelson (Blake Lively), who was sentenced to 20 years in prison, regains her freedom.She is planning a wedding on the island of Capri, and an old friend becomes her bridesmaid.A crime occurs during the ceremony.

programme.title: Welcome to Marwen
programme.desc: Mark Hogancamp (Steve Carell) is an illustrator, known primarily for his World War II graphics.However, he hides quite an original preference.He is fascinated by women's shoes.At home, she has a large collection of high heels, sandals, flip-flops and many other shoes.His secret is revealed unexpectedly and causes great emotions.He is attacked by a group of neo-Nazis.The injuries are so severe that they result in loss of not only memory, but also the ability to speak and move.His artistic career is ruined.The man starts therapy, hoping to regain his former shape.However, he struggles with enormous trauma and mental problems.He finally manages to find a new passion.He constructs a village in the garden, which he names Marwen.Its inhabitants, the dolls, are modeled on real people from his life.It turns out that the mockup helps him deal with panic attacks.However, he still cannot forget his experiences.Meanwhile, a new neighbor, Nicol (Leslie Mann), moves in next door.The film is inspired by the true story of artist Mark Hogancamp.The town he built is located in Kingston.
